scripts.dev: npm run build -w @iappstores/contracts && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @iappstores/contracts && npm run build -w @iappstores/api && npm run build -w @iappstores/web
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean -w @iappstores/contracts && npm run build -w @iappstores/contracts && npm run clean -w @iappstores/api && npm run build -w @iappstores/api && npm run clean -w @iappstores/web && npm run build -w @iappstores/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @iappstores/api && npm run lint -w @iappstores/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @iappstores/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @iappstores/api && npm run typecheck -w @iappstores/web
scripts.validate:sources: npm run build -w @iappstores/contracts && npm run validate:sources -w @iappstores/api -- ../../repolist.txt
